description_long: This is a tall, cylindrical ceramic vase with a slightly tapered top and rounded base. The surface is predominantly a soft off-white or light beige, adorned with delicate black line art depicting botanical motifs, including leaves and small floral clusters. The artwork wraps around the vase, with the densest decoration near the top and bottom, leaving the central area more open and minimal. The finish appears matte with a subtle sheen, suggesting a glazed ceramic surface. There are no visible handles or openings other than the top mouth, which is circular and smooth. The vase exudes a modern yet organic aesthetic, suitable for both decorative and functional use in urban environments.
description: A tall, cylindrical off-white ceramic vase with black botanical line art and a smooth, matte finish. The design features delicate floral and leaf motifs wrapping around the surface.
description_view_0: This view highlights the upper floral motif and the lower leaf design, with the main decorative elements clearly visible on the front.
description_view_1: This angle shows the continuation of the floral motif near the top and a more minimal central area, with some leaf lines extending upward.
description_view_2: This side view emphasizes the elongated leaf motif stretching horizontally, with less floral detail and more open space.
description_view_3: This perspective displays the rounded base and the wraparound leaf design, with the floral motif partially visible at the top edge.
attribute_location: urban park bench or sidewalk planter area
